description: A stateful process is spawned outside any supervisor, so when it crashes it is never restarted and its work is lost.
body: Failure mode: code calls spawn or starts a GenServer without linking it into a supervision tree, so a crash leaves no process behind, in-flight work is dropped, and nothing restores a clean state. Detection signals: spawn/GenServer.start without a supervisor child_spec; functionality silently stops after an error with no restart; orphaned pids. Do not run stateful long-lived processes unsupervised. Safer fallback: define a child_spec and place the process under a supervisor with an appropriate restart strategy, use start_supervised! in tests, and verify that killing it triggers a restart to the init state.
